prs.title: language dropdown
prs.body: # Pull Request: Add Language Dropdown to Main Page ## Description This PR adds a language dropdown feature to the main page using Google Translate API, allowing users to switch between different languages without affecting the existing UI elements. ## Changes Made ### **Added Language Dropdown Component** - Integrated Google Translate API for language translation functionality - Created a dropdown menu with popular language options - Positioned the dropdown to avoid interference with existing UI elements ### **Added Github link button** - Bottom right corner contains a button named 'Star on Github' - It redirects to [this repo](https://github.com/ramanuj-droid/Anti-Boredom) ### Google Translate API Setup ```javascript // Load Google Translate API function googleTranslateElementInit() { new google.translate.TranslateElement({ pageLanguage: 'en', includedLanguages: 'en,es,fr,de,zh-CN,ja,ko,pt,ru,ar,hi', layout: google.translate.TranslateElement.InlineLayout.SIMPLE }, 'google_translate_element'); } ``` (*languages can be subject to change by editing this function with language language code) ## Visual Changes ### Before - Only dark/night mode toggle present in header - No language selection option - No Github link button ### After - Language dropdown added in header area - Properly aligned with dark/night mode toggle - No disruption to existing main page elements - Clean, integrated design - Github repo link button ## Screenshots ### View ### Dropdown Expanded ### Star Github Button ## Related Issues Closes #115 --- **Ready for Review** ✅

prs.title: Pilot's Fantasy
prs.body:
# ✈️ Pilot's Fantasy

## 📝 Description
Drag and soar through a dreamy sky in this interactive flight experience where you pilot a fighter jet through clouds, stars, and endless horizons.

## ✨ Features
- **🎮 Interactive Fighter Jet** - Drag to fly
- **🌌 Dynamic Environment** - Twinkling stars, floating clouds, and scrolling mountains
- **🔥 Jet Effects** - Animated afterburner
- **📱 Touch Support** - Works on desktop and mobile devices

## 🛠️ Technical Stack
- HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- No external dependencies

## 🚀 Usage
Open the HTML file in any modern browser and drag the jet to fly through the sky.

prs.title: HimanshuDubey
prs.body: # 🌟 Neon Login/Signup Page - Hacktoberfest Contribution ## 📋 Overview This pull request adds a modern, visually stunning neon-themed login and signup page with video background integration to the project. ## ✨ Features Added ### 🎨 Design & UI - **Neon Aesthetic**: Vibrant neon glow effects with cyan/magenta color scheme - **Video Background**: Dynamic video background with overlay for enhanced visual appeal - **Responsive Design**: Fully responsive layout that works on all device sizes - **Tab Navigation**: Smooth tab switching between Login and Sign Up forms - **Animated Transitions**: Smooth animations for tab switching and form interactions ### 🔐 Functionality - **Login Form**: Email and password input with validation - **Sign Up Form**: Email, password, and confirm password fields with terms acceptance - **Password Toggle**: Eye icon to show/hide password for better UX - **Form Validation**: Required field validation for all inputs - **Forgot Password**: Quick access link for password recovery ### 🎯 Technical Highlights - Clean, semantic HTML5 structure - Modern CSS with custom properties (CSS variables) - Vanilla JavaScript for interactivity (no dependencies) - Cross-browser compatible - Accessible form elements with proper labels ## 📁 Files Included - `index.html` - Main HTML structure - `style.css` - Complete styling with neon effects (referenced) - `main.js` - JavaScript functionality (referenced) ## 🎨 Screenshot > Add screenshots of the login/signup page here ## 🤝 Contribution Guidelines This contribution follows the project's coding standards and best practices: - Clean, readable code with comments - Semantic HTML structure - Modular CSS organization - Vanilla JavaScript (no framework dependencies) - Mobile-first responsive design ## 🎃 Hacktoberfest Coded with love ❤️ for **Hacktoberfest 2025**. 🎉

prs.title: Added Theme Toggle Button and added background video
prs.body: # Pull Request: Theme Toggle & Video Background Enhancement ## 📋 Description This PR adds a professional theme toggle switch and dynamic video backgrounds to the Login/Signup Templates Showcase, significantly improving the user experience and visual appeal of the project. ## ✨ Features Added ### 1. **Theme Toggle Switch** - Positioned in the top-right corner of the header - Smooth toggle animation with icon indicators (🌙 for dark, ☀️ for light) - Responsive design that adapts to mobile screens ### 2. **Dynamic Video Backgrounds** - **Dark Theme** - **Light Theme** - Smooth fade transitions between video backgrounds - Optimized overlays to ensure content readability - Videos are from [pexel.com](https://www.pexels.com/) the videos can be changed by replacing the link or path of the video ## 🎨 Visual Changes ### Dark Theme - Deep gradient overlay on video background - Glassmorphic cards with semi-transparent white backgrounds - Gradient text for the main heading - Purple accent colors for interactive elements ### Light Theme - Bright, clean overlay on video background - White cards with subtle shadows - Darker gradient text for better contrast - Professional color scheme throughout ## 📱 Responsive Design - Theme toggle repositions for mobile devices - Video backgrounds scale appropriately - Card grid adjusts for all screen sizes - Touch-friendly toggle switch ## 📸 Screenshots ### Dark Theme ### Light Theme Please review and provide feedback. Happy to make any adjustments! 🎉

issues.title: [DOC] Documentation Improvement: Adding Jump Links
issues.body:
### Documentation issue

Currently, users need to manually scroll through the README.md file to find the specific section they are interested in. This can be time-consuming and frustrating, especially for long documents.

### Describe the thing to improve

To improve the user experience, we can add jump links (also known as anchor links or hash links) to the README.md file. Jump links are clickable elements that allow users to navigate directly to a specific section of the document.

- Improved usability: Jump links make it easier for users to find the information they need quickly.

- Enhanced accessibility: Jump links can be helpful for users with disabilities who may find it difficult to scroll through long documents.
 

### Describe the solution (optional)

- Add Jump links in markdown files especially README.md   

Suggestion:
add the top of the file itself 
![image](https://github.com/refinedev/refine/assets/161914655/f9e39de1-c3e7-408d-931d-c5bc2ea49b4a)
in between that space!!


must have jump links~~~~~

1. Key Features
2. Quick start
3. Next step
4. Contribution & Contributors etc.....
